stories.title: Cadillac Championship Round 1 Opens — Blue Monster Returns to PGA Tour After 10 Years

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Blue Monster is BACK. 🐉

Cadillac Championship Round 1 tees off TODAY at Trump National Doral — first PGA Tour event at the course in 10 years.

$20M. No cut. Scheffler as No. 1 seed.

Golf Channel at 3 PM ET. #CadillacChampionship #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Tiger won here FOUR times. His 2013 score (-19) is still the record.

Now Scottie Scheffler walks the Blue Monster looking for his first Signature Event win of 2026.

He's come close — T2 Masters, T2 Heritage. Today could be different.

#CadillacChampionship

article.headline: Blue Monster Is Back: Cadillac Championship Round 1 Tees Off at Trump National Doral

research.facts:
Cadillac Championship Round 1
**Verified Facts:**
- Cadillac Championship dates: April 30 - May 3, 2026, Trump National Doral, Miami [HIGH — PGA Tour official]
- Course: Trump National Doral, Blue Monster, par 72, 7,739 yards [HIGH — Golf News Net, PGA Tour]
- 4 par-5s, 4 par-3s, 10 par-4s [HIGH — Golf News Net, PGA Tour]
- $20M Signature Event [HIGH — prior pipeline, PGA Tour official]
- 72-player field, no 36-hole cut [HIGH — PGA Tour Signature Event format]
- Last PGA Tour event at Doral: 2016 WGC-Cadillac Championship, Adam Scott won [HIGH — PGA Tour, multiple sources]
- First Tour event at club since 2016 (10-year hiatus) [HIGH — Yahoo Sports, multiple]
- 56th Tour event at the club [HIGH — PGA Tour official]
- Renovation by Gil Hanse and Jim Wagner — new lakes on par-3 15th and drivable par-4 16th [HIGH — PGA Tour official, Golf Digest]
- Scottie Scheffler (World No. 1) is top-ranked player in field [HIGH]
- Also in field: Tommy Fleetwood, Cameron Young, Viktor Hovland, Jon Rahm [HIGH — PGA Tour Inside the Field]
- R1 TV: Golf Channel 3-7 PM ET [HIGH — golf.com TV schedule]

stories.title: Korda Opens Defense Bid at LPGA Riviera Maya Open — HOF Within Reach

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda won the Chevron Championship last week.

She's back at the LPGA Riviera Maya Open TODAY at Mayakoba.

She needs 5 more LPGA Hall of Fame points. She's currently at 22 of 27.

Back-to-back wins would be one of the best LPGA season starts in history. 🏌️‍♀️ #LPGA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Korda's 2026 so far:
🏆 2 wins
🏆 1 major (Chevron Championship — 3rd of career)
📍 World No. 1

Now she's teeing it up in Mexico AGAIN today.

Nobody in women's golf is playing better right now. #LPGA #Korda

article.headline: Korda Returns at LPGA Riviera Maya Open With Hall of Fame in Her Sights

research.facts:
LPGA Riviera Maya Open
**Verified Facts:**
- Tournament: Mexico Riviera Maya Open at Mayakoba, El Camaleon Golf Course, Playa del Carmen, Mexico [HIGH — LPGA.com official]
- Dates: April 30-May 3, 2026 [HIGH — LPGA.com]
- Korda World No. 1 [HIGH — prior pipelines, LPGA official]
- Korda won Chevron Championship for 3rd career major (17th LPGA title) [HIGH — April 27-29 pipelines]
- Korda: 22 of 27 LPGA Hall of Fame points [HIGH — April 28-29 pipelines; HOF formula: needs 27 total, currently 22, needs 5 more]
- Korda defended Mayakoba (described as "defending champion" — need to verify: pipeline notes April 29 said "Korda at Riviera Maya Open — next: April 30-May 3; going for back-to-back wins") [MEDIUM — the April 29 pipeline says "going for back-to-back wins" and "Chevron 3rd major by 5 shots"; the Mayakoba event is a NEW win opportunity, not necessarily defending the same event from 2025; use carefully]
**Note on "defending":** Korda won Chevron last week. This is her next start (Riviera Maya). "Back-to-back wins" = going for her 2nd win in consecutive starts in 2026, not necessarily defending from 2025. Corrected in articles.

stories.title: Blue Monster History — Trump Doral's Return to Golf's Big Stage

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Blue Monster by the numbers:

🐉 Par 72, 7,739 yards
🐉 First PGA Tour event: 1962
🐉 Tiger Woods: 4 wins (-19 course record in 2013)
🐉 10 years since the Tour was last here

Now it's back for the Cadillac Championship. #PGATour #Doral

article.headline: The Blue Monster at Doral: 50 Years of PGA Tour History Returns to the Big Stage

research.facts:
Blue Monster History
**Verified Facts:**
- Originally designed by Dick Wilson [HIGH — PGA Tour, Golf Digest]
- Hosted PGA Tour events from 1962 to 2016 (Doral Open → WGC-Cadillac Championship) [HIGH — PGA Tour]
- Tiger Woods: 4 wins at Doral (1997, 2005, 2006, 2013) [HIGH — PGA Tour, established record]
- Tiger's 2013 score (-19) = course scoring record [HIGH — PGA Tour]
- Other winners: Jack Nicklaus, Lee Trevino, Tom Weiskopf, Raymond Floyd, Nick Faldo, Ben Crenshaw [HIGH — PGA Tour official]
- Par 72, 7,739 yards [HIGH]
- Renovation added new lakes on 15 and 16 [HIGH — PGA Tour]

stories.title: Star Power Gap at Doral — Why McIlroy, Schauffele and Others Skip

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
5 of the top 15 in the world rankings are SKIPPING the Cadillac Championship this week:

❌ McIlroy (reigning Masters champ)
❌ Schauffele
❌ Åberg
❌ MacIntyre
❌ M. Fitzpatrick

Reason: saving their best golf for the PGA Championship, May 14. #PGATour

article.headline: Five of the World's Top 15 Skip Doral — The PGA Tour's Scheduling Problem Is Getting Worse

research.facts:
Big Names Absent
**Verified Facts:**
- 5 of top-15 OWGR missing: McIlroy, Schauffele, Åberg, MacIntyre, Matt Fitzpatrick [HIGH — Front Office Sports, Golf Monthly]
- McIlroy: won 2026 Masters, choosing to rest [HIGH]
- Matt Fitzpatrick: just won Zurich Classic (April 27 pipeline); resting [HIGH]
- Reason cited: PGA Championship prep (upcoming May 14 Philadelphia); Truist Championship also next week [HIGH — Golf.com, Yahoo Sports]
- Largest top-player absence at any 2026 Sig Event [HIGH — Front Office Sports]

stories.title: LIV Golf Virginia Preview — Rahm vs. Niemann, DeChambeau Returns

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Jon Rahm won his last LIV event by SIX shots.

Now he heads to Trump National DC for the Maaden LIV Golf Virginia — May 7-10.

Niemann defends individually. DeChambeau (wrist) returns.

Can Legion XIII make it back-to-back team wins? #LIVGolf

article.headline: LIV Golf Virginia Preview: Rahm Arrives Hot, DeChambeau Returns, Niemann Defends

research.facts:
LIV Virginia Preview
**Verified Facts:**
- Dates: May 7-10, 2026 [HIGH — LIV Golf official]
- Venue: Trump National Golf Club, Sterling, VA (Washington DC) [HIGH — LIV Golf]
- Official name: Maaden LIV Golf Virginia [HIGH — LIV Golf official]
- Rahm (Legion XIII): won Mexico City by 6 shots (7-under 64, April 22 pipeline) [HIGH]
- Niemann (Torque GC): defending 2025 individual champion [HIGH — April 26-28 pipelines]
- DeChambeau (Crushers GC): defending 2025 team champion; WD Mexico City with wrist injury [HIGH — April 29 pipeline]
- Team standings (as of April 29): Ripper GC 89.75 pts; 4Aces 88 pts; Legion XIII 3rd [HIGH — April 29 pipeline]
- Format: 57 players, 13 teams, no cut [HIGH — LIV Golf official]
